'''Issor''' was the most powerful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Trulalis system]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Issori]] and [[Odenji]].

==Appearances==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Issor}}

*{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}

*{{JournalCite|7|Old Corellian: A Guide for the Curious Scholar}}
*{{JournalCite|12|Idol Intentions}} {{Mo}}
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}}
